title: Region-Based Segmentation Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the three main region-based segmentation techniques: region growing, region splitting, and region merging, and how they can be combined.
elements: Initial Partition (e.g., Quad Tree for Splitting/Merging)
relationships: Seed Points are selected from the Original Image for Region Growing
Original Image is divided into an Initial Partition for Splitting/Merging
Region Growing adds adjacent pixels to seeds based on Homogeneity Criteria
Region Splitting divides non-homogeneous regions from the Initial Partition
Region Merging combines adjacent homogeneous regions from the Initial Partition
Splitting and Merging processes loop based on the Homogeneity Criteria Check
All processes result in a Final Segmented Image
